observation.command:
python3 -c "
import json
with open('build/test/task2/functional-0/001_var_defn.sysu.c/answer.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
def show(obj, depth=0, max_depth=4):
    if depth > max_depth: return
    if isinstance(obj, dict):
        kind = obj.get('kind', '')
        name = obj.get('name', '')
        qt = obj.get('type', {}).get('qualType', '') if isinstance(obj.get('type'), dict) else ''
        print(f\"{'  '*depth}{kind} name='{name}' typeof={qt}\")
        for k, v in obj.items():
            if k in ('kind', 'name', 'type', 'id', 'loc', 'range', 'mangledName', 'isImplicit', 'isUsed'): continue
            show(v, depth+1, max_depth)
    elif isinstance(obj, list):
        for v in obj:
            show(v, depth, max_depth)
show(d)
" 2>&1 | head -40
